textByHashes.62500d364b2e1b64e9ae93eb9310f2bba34fff8a: Cleaning, cleaning, always cleaning. This apprenticeship isn't all that it was cracked up to be.
textByHashes.ab6e47534b8287bf201a2acc71dd4a0aa6a2ce01: Oh, Aadeela, the sorceress upstairs, said she'd teach me magic, she did. And here I am scrubbing floors without a spell to help me.
textByHashes.737021a2490461cd28110e0973011acdf259ed74: No, no, she'd kill me or worse if she knew I was using Magic to do chores. Her last apprentice - well I'd rather not say.
textByHashes.1c72d7c4eed9e5538bcf6e21aa8e1230fb7d29ad: They say she turned them into little spiders.
textByHashes.83f285e5735158e335318cd1042cc163be5b2327: Nope. Clean this, clean that. When I'm finished cleaning here I have to go help out in the garden.
textByHashes.2b75405bbd4e6c49729b0bd6f84c8868dcf5b642: Oh, I shouldn't have told you.
textByHashes.d3939b25c13c742125f266401757bdf57d2e7de9: Well, if you don't mind then, I'm busy and have to get back to work.
textByHashes.3299e96bc442daa97fc3ccf39aa9b69f9e0e5976: You know you're right. Nobody listens to me.
textByHashes.61ec3c81a80a8942c364d000ac8120a9d81fe81d: Yes, if I just let my frustrations out, I'd feel a lot better. Now what was I saying?
textByHashes.d7851cd5114edb1cb16e2720dc27fd3c5aa61dbb: Oh yeah, that dreadful garden of hers.
textByHashes.e206d189caf1c179b57e3742f0593d7a70aca736: Well it's here, but not really. You see the sorceress is trying out some new type of compression magic.
textByHashes.94d0a870d555acd63edae96a7ae55487f255fac7: It would take too long to explain and, to be honest, I don't really understand how it works.
textByHashes.ebb7034d69a57cb72d65084618003bfae8661f71: By magic! The sorceress did teach me one spell.
textByHashes.5191ec6af58728677a2a238b28a7b787d2e2bada: I can't do that now, I'm far too busy sweeping.
textByHashes.fd7d4c0c2ad31d55f91b06994e590cf1ea46dd40: Okay, here goes! Remember, to return, just drink from the fountain.
textByHashes.e45f09cad9d5a95d6cea390f7301253e928f2da5: Okay, here goes - and remember, to return just drink from the fountain.
textByHashes.045b8a54cbef3936aaa7c84408608f4552297817: Oh, I'm sorry, could you pick up your follower first? I'm really not sure that I could teleport the both of you.
